ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the disease */,
  "mesh_code" TEXT /* MeSH code for the disease */,
  "disease_category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., infectious, genetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein interaction */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease associated with the interaction */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the interaction */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence or strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., physical, functional) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the interaction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_source_database FOREIGN KEY ("source_database") REFERENCES source_databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the database */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data is released (e.g., CC0, MIT) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol associated with the protein */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID for the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant in an interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein involved in the interaction */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the protein in the interaction (e.g., binder, binder) */,
  "binding_residues" TEXT /* Binding residues involved in the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_participants_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_participants_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, search) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_proteins" (
  "disease_protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease-protein association */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "association_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_proteins_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_proteins_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., confidence, specificity) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric used to calculate the score (e.g., PMI, mutual information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_scores_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., publication, method) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., PubMed, UniProt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_metadata_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_version_history_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_keywords_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the domain */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the structure */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Chain of the structure */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_structures_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
